patch.value: Sentry PM-CLI-R/PM-CLI-S: undefined-status .trim and undefined-tags .join crashes (fixed in HEAD, mark resolvedInNextRelease)

Sentry (project unbrained/pm-cli) shows 2 recent unresolved high errors, both on release pm-cli@2026.5.18, env production, server media-server, lastSeen 2026-05-20 (counts 34 + 19). Root-caused both to malformed items (missing status/tags) hitting unguarded code in the PUBLISHED 2026.5.18 build: PM-CLI-R 'Cannot read properties of undefined (reading trim)' via pm list -> applyFilters -> isTerminal -> normalizeStatusInput(value).trim() where normalizeStatusInput was typed value:string and did value.trim() without a guard. PM-CLI-S 'Cannot read properties of undefined (reading join)' via pm search -> scoreDocument -> item.tags.join(' '). BOTH are already fixed on HEAD by post-release hardening commits: 9eb8faf2 (normalizeStatusInput value:unknown + typeof guard) and cb902c1b (item.tags.join -> stringArray(item.tags).join, comments/notes/learnings/dependencies wrapped in textEntries/dependencyEntries). They only keep firing because media-server still runs the published 2026.5.18. 100% coverage exercises the new guard branches.

Both crashes confirmed fixed on HEAD with guard branches covered; PM-CLI-R and PM-CLI-S marked resolvedInNextRelease in Sentry so they clear when the next release ships and reopen only on genuine regression; root cause + commits documented.

Root-caused both crashes to malformed-item null-safety gaps in published 2026.5.18; confirmed already fixed on HEAD (9eb8faf2 + cb902c1b) with 100% coverage on the guard branches; marked both resolvedInNextRelease in Sentry.
Sentry shows 0 unresolved high/critical; issues stay resolved unless they recur in a release newer than 2026.5.18.

sentry-telemetry-gate now ok:true (critical 0, high 0, total 0, threshold_ok); telemetry ok (error rate 2.6%, 0 rows missing error_code). PM-CLI-R + PM-CLI-S set to status=resolved (inRelease pm-cli@2026.5.18 = next release).

Verified PM-CLI-R (undefined status .trim via list/applyFilters/isTerminal/normalizeStatusInput) and PM-CLI-S (undefined tags .join via search/scoreDocument) are both already fixed on HEAD by post-2026.5.18 hardening commits 9eb8faf2 and cb902c1b; the new typeof/array guards are exercised by the 100%-coverage suite. Marked both Sentry issues status=resolved (inRelease pm-cli@2026.5.18, i.e. resolvedInNextRelease) via the org issues API. Re-ran scripts/release/sentry-telemetry-gate.mjs: now ok:true with sentry critical=0/high=0/total=0 (threshold_ok) and telemetry ok (finish_error_rate 2.6%, 0 rows missing error_code). They will reopen only on a genuine regression in a release newer than 2026.5.18.
